value.address: 742 Design Boulevard, Suite 300, New York, NY 10003

value.q: Can I request customization for the furniture designs?
value.a: Yes! We specialize in custom fabric upholstery, custom dimensions, and finish variations. Please submit an enquiry or call our design assistants directly.

value.q: How long does shipping take for order items?
value.a: Standard items in stock ship within 3-5 business days and deliver in 7-10 days. Customized furniture and wallpaper prints take 4-6 weeks to build, inspect, and ship.

value.q: Do you offer virtual interior design consultations?
value.a: Absolutely! Our design doctors offer a 45-minute virtual video walkthrough to assist with room styling, spatial planning, and material selections.

value.q: What is your return policy for delicate decor items?
value.a: We accept returns on all standard unused items within 14 days of delivery. Custom-made orders or bespoke wallpaper measurements cannot be returned unless damaged during shipping.

value.title: Prescribe Style to Your Space
value.subtitle: Welcome to Dr. Decors. We heal dull rooms with handcrafted furnishings, designer lighting, and tailored wallpapers.

value.title: Sculpted Lighting Masterpieces
value.subtitle: A stunning collection of modern pendant globes, solid marble desk lamps, and warm light sculptures.
